operational_meaning: High service risk with positive expected margin.
recommended_action: Prioritize pre-dispatch protection and exception handling before lower-risk work.
caveat: Use targeted intervention rather than blanket premium-cost expediting; no realized intervention impact is claimed.

operational_meaning: High service risk with weak or negative expected margin.
recommended_action: Review selectively before committing scarce expedited capacity.
caveat: Small segment size and weak predicted economics require case-by-case review.

operational_meaning: Lower service risk with positive expected margin.
recommended_action: Maintain service quality and protect customer experience without unnecessary escalation.
caveat: Low predicted risk does not remove the need for normal monitoring.

operational_meaning: Lower service risk with weak or negative expected margin.
recommended_action: Use normal operating procedures and monitor margin drivers.
caveat: Small segment size limits broad conclusions; recommendations remain conservative.

operational_meaning: Score inputs are missing, so the order cannot be assigned reliably.
recommended_action: Hold automated AO3 prioritization and review score pipeline completeness.
caveat: Data-quality exception, not an operational priority segment.

risk_band: AO3 order value or predicted margin missing or invalid
operational_meaning: Margin inputs are missing or invalid, so the order cannot be placed reliably on the margin axis.
recommended_action: Hold automated margin-based prioritization and review denominator or margin construction.
